title: Let's Build a Team ~The Secret to the Strongest Team~
description: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan in a fun way!

scenes.speech: Let's learn how to build the strongest team!
scenes.title: Let's Build a Team ~The Secret to the Strongest Team~

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Why do we need a team?
scenes.content: There's a limit to what one person can do. Apple: Steve Jobs (vision) + Wozniak (technology). Google: Larry Page + Sergey Brin. The best companies are born from the best teams!
scenes.highlight: Startup success rate: Companies with multiple founders have a higher success rate than solo founders (multiple studies)

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: 3 types of people needed in a team
scenes.content: ① Visionary (dreamer: idea and vision) ② Hustler (sales and business development) ③ Hacker (technology and product development) - A team with these three types is the strongest! Which type are you?
scenes.highlight: 3 types of teams: Each type complements the others to create a team that can 'create, sell, and dream'

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Team 'psychological safety'
scenes.content: Psychological safety: 'No matter what opinion I share, I won't be rejected.' This is the most important factor in the best teams, according to Google's research! If you're afraid of being thought stupid, your creativity will die.
scenes.highlight: Google's 'Project Aristotle': Psychological safety is the most important factor in top teams

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Role sharing and communication
scenes.content: Clearly define who does what in a team. Use tools like Slack, Notion, and Trello to organize communication. Hold regular meetings to share information and synchronize!
scenes.highlight: Startup communication tools: Slack, Notion, Figma, GitHub, Google Workspace

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Having a mentor
scenes.content: Almost all successful entrepreneurs have a mentor! Facebook's Zuckerberg consulted with Steve Jobs. Find a mentor in your local community, entrepreneur, or teacher!
scenes.highlight: Mentoring effect: Entrepreneurs with mentors have a 2-3 times higher success rate than those without

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Using interns and part-time workers
scenes.content: When you're short on manpower! Accept interns (unpaid or paid short-term students) to get new perspectives, skills, and energy from students. Reach out to universities and high schools!
scenes.highlight: Internships: Provide experience to students while securing low-cost talent for companies

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Overcoming team conflicts
scenes.content: Conflicts are a sign of a growing team! The key is to discuss ideas, not attack people. When emotions run high, take a break and refocus on 'the team's goals'.
scenes.highlight: 'Constructive conflict': Teams that overcome conflicts grow the strongest

scenes.speech: Let's learn about building a team with Gal-chan!
scenes.title: Team building that strengthens the team
scenes.content: Share experiences outside of work, such as eating together, going on retreats, playing games, or volunteering. The strongest team starts with a friendly team!
scenes.highlight: Team building investment: Improved team cohesion → significant improvements in productivity, creativity, and turnover rates

scenes.speech: You've mastered the secret to the strongest team! Next, let's learn from failures 🎉
scenes.title: Lesson complete!
